translations.en: a man with a wide bottom. His voice is almost like a woman's.
translations.zh: 身形下寬的男子，聲音幾乎像女人。

translations.en: "Ooh, you look so thin! Here, have a bite of bread."
translations.zh: 「哎呀，你看起來好瘦！來，吃一口麵包吧。」

translations.en: He gives you a @roll; it is still warm from the oven.
translations.zh: 他給你一個@小麵包；還帶著爐子裡的熱氣。

translations.en: "Why, hello there, $G."
"My name is Shubin, $G."
"I'm a @cook, $G."
"He is my friend."
"@Sandy says the mantra of eating is 'yum,' $G. Hee, hee!"
translations.zh: 「@珊迪說，飲食的咒言是『嗯嗯』，$G。嘻嘻！」

translations.en: You friend Iolo rolls his eyes. "Such wisdom we can surely do without!"
translations.zh: 你的朋友伊歐洛翻了個白眼。「這種智慧，我們倒是可以免了！」
translations.note: 原文 'You friend' 是錯字，應為 Your

translations.en: "I have no more rolls, $G."
"Being a cook is like being an @adventurer, $G."
"Yes, $G. I must gather up all my ingredients with @care."
translations.zh: 「是的，$G。我必須@用心地蒐集所有食材。」

translations.en: "So that I have the right @ingredients, $G."
"Adventurers are always searching for this or that, $G. So are cooks."
translations.zh: 「冒險家總是到處尋找這個那個，$G。廚師也是一樣。」

translations.en: "Do you know of Magincian Pastry?"
"Have you one with you?"
"Goodbye, $G."
"That's one of the eight @mantras, isn't it?"
"Oh, do not tease old Shubin so, $G!"
"Oh, thank you, thank you, thank you!"
He ask anxiously "Do you like it, $G?"
translations.zh: 他焦急地問道：「你喜歡嗎，$G？」
translations.note: 原文 'He ask' 語法錯誤，保留翻譯語意

translations.en: "Such a picky eater. No wonder you're so skinny, $G."
"Have a whole tray, then."
"It is a marvellous dish, $G. My friend Sandy gave me the recipe..."
translations.zh: 「這是一道了不起的料理，$G。我的朋友珊迪給了我食譜……」

translations.en: "I'm only missing one ingredient..."
"Well, I'd like to make it, $G, but I cannot get one of the ingredients..."
translations.zh: 「嗯，$G，我很想做，可是其中一種食材我弄不到……」

translations.en: "I sure would appreciate it if you brought it back for me if you came across one in your travels, $G..."
translations.zh: 「若你在旅途中碰巧遇上，能帶回來給老書賓，那就太感激了，$G……」

translations.en: "If you could find time for old Shubin, that is..."
"Would it be too much trouble to bring me back a dragon's @egg, $G?"
translations.zh: 「麻煩你幫老書賓帶一顆龍@蛋回來，好嗎，$G？」

translations.en: He sighs. "Well, $G, it did no harm to ask, I suppose."
translations.zh: 他嘆口氣。「唉，$G，試著問問也無妨，我想。」

translations.en: "I just know you will remember Shubin, $G. Thank you."
translations.zh: 「我就知道你不會忘記書賓的，$G。謝謝你。」

translator_notes: 書賓是修道院廚師，身形下寬、聲音細柔。他想做瑪金夏糕點（Magincian Pastry），缺的食材是龍蛋。友人珊迪給了他食譜。他對飲食的熱情表現在誇張的感謝和關心旅人的言談中。
